title: "Oops something went wrong" when trying to add a recipe to my integration
excerpt:
I am working on an integration feature in a custom app. When building recipes, adding a culumn change trigger gives the following error and I cannot edit the recipe or save it. 
Is anyone else experiencing this?

posts.author: willsamadi (Will Samadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am working on an integration feature in a custom app. When building recipes, adding a culumn change trigger gives the following error and I cannot edit the recipe or save it.

Is anyone else experiencing this?

posts.author: willsamadi (Will Samadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Now that seems to be fixed but the recipes don’t ever show up in my automations. No matter how long I wait…

Please publicly report any ongoing problem on your end so it can be referenced.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @willsamadi,

This issue has been fixed. If you still have any issue, please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it (such as account ID, board IDs, item IDs, timestamps, etc.) so that our team can take a look into it and we will be happy to help!
